name: reference_h_AB6
description: H_AB=6 ablation profile for paper Open Problem prob:hab-residual. Identical to reference v2 EXCEPT h_AB=5->6: tests prediction that incrementing h_AB from 5 to 6 reduces per-round H_AB-collision probability by 2^8=256x, with predicted residual KM divergence rate ~3.1e-7 (vs reference v2's 8e-5). Bandwidth cost: +N*1 byte = +4 KB/round at N=4096. lambda_preimage = 8*(6+2+8) = 128 bits (vs reference 120). Research-only ablation cell, NOT a deployment profile.
